title: Long Haul
description: Exploring personal struggle and support and friendship.
lyrics: No one ever said it's easy No one ever said it's this easy I am in the hospital I am in the hospital And no one ever said it's easy To be there for you, for me, for anyone I think you need to listen to me Just a little bit, I'll tell ya I'm in for the whole long haul Getting you home, where we going now? To the different apartment, to the different stand What you doing? It's class 4, we're out there Class warfare, that's right You were born in the wrong place at the wrong time But if you take my hand, we'll go past that direction Pass the money, all the banks, all the fake Things that you say to yourself inside your desk Is it Sigmarter yet? Has the religion crossed the oath? Or just a crucifix? Can I understand, is it just a new fix? What, like the left and the right? You know it's in there Just another fight for us to say the end We wish you were here, my friend I'm in it for the long haul I said, I'm in it for you For me, in the long haul Baby, can't you see it's us against them Us and not them I know the little heat beat back to the hymn I just want you to understand that we're friends No need to cover up to that You can get fucked any which way you want I'm not sitting jealous, see no empathy, no willing I'm just like, man, we can do this better than we did For the past 16 years Just a little too much to give up for me You know, I'm saying, I'm in it Oh, baby, yeah I'm in it for the win Hey, don't judge yourself Find self-love, find self-love I don't care, I don't care, find self-love Cause without it, you'll be there Judging you to the end of the nightmare Cause I'm in it for the long haul I'm in it and I'm ready to have you Be my Social character, that's such a wicked figure I just want this to be more than you can ever be Be me, be you, be anything That's better than us that we could ever dream These are the rhetorics I tell myself over each freestyle payment Put them over the rollercoaster of me Saying I'll give everything to you, being Okay, whatever, you're not really giving everything When I am, I'm dying to, I even gave you my last name So just try to understand I said, even from the beginning, my friend, my fam I'm in it for the long haul Now you're wiping us free Hold to these things that makes you holy Free body www.LRCgenerator.com www.LRCgenerator.com www.LRCgenerator.com www.LRCgenerator.com www.LRCgenerator.com
